name: Sofas
description: Handcrafted sofas with kiln-dried hardwood frames and high-resilience foam — built for everyday luxury and years of beautiful living.

name: Beds
description: Statement beds with upholstered headboards and smart storage — engineered for stability and finished to perfection.

name: Dining Sets
description: Solid-wood dining tables and chairs designed for long dinners and lasting memories, in seating options from 4 to 8.

name: Office Furniture
description: Executive desks, boss chairs, visitor chairs and workstations that bring boardroom polish to every workspace.

name: Chairs
description: Accent chairs, ergonomic office chairs, visitor and boss chairs — a seat for every space and every posture.

name: Wardrobes
description: Sliding and hinged wardrobes with intelligent interiors, soft-close fittings and finishes tailored to your room.

name: TV Units
description: Wall-mounted and floor TV units with cable management and display niches — the anchor of a modern living room.

name: Study Tables
description: Compact and executive study tables with cable routing and storage — built for productivity and posture.

name: Storage Furniture
description: Bookshelves, shoe racks, crockery units, bedside tables and chests of drawers — storage that earns its place.

name: Custom Furniture
description: Bespoke furniture crafted to your exact dimensions, materials and finish — your imagination, our workshop.
